markdown:
#  How can I tell if I have a free or paid Procore company account? 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Background 
From preconstruction to project execution and financial management, companies can purchase Procore as a software solution to manage their construction projects.
Procore also offers free accounts to collaborator companies so they can view and access their Procore projects and bids, manage their team and business profile, and more.
##  Answer 
**Paid Procore Accounts**
Users in paid Procore accounts have a navigation menu across the top of their screens, where tool and project selection menus are found. A company logo is usually visible on the left side of the navigation menu.
![Clipboard E9904ab306f5eda17e72dbc6b35db7324](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1a8884e198fd52c74e2eee23f9ad9266/8a1074a0b7f34d6f26514e597038fbf4/clipboard_e9904ab306f5eda17e72dbc6b35db7324.png?fm=webp)
**Free Procore Accounts**
Users with free Procore accounts have a navigation menu that runs from top to bottom along the left side of the screen. A Procore logo is visible at the top of this navigation menu.
![Clipboard E02c38747b56a7edeb39c769215b82d](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0be6769912dd565466b9c133a91c545d/f5bae369150492b9403999277d380537/clipboard_e02c38747b56a7edeb39c72b69215b82d.png?fm=webp)

title: How can I tell if I have a free or paid Procore company account?
description: How to tell if you are using a free or paid Procore company account.
